using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.Events;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;

/// <summary>
/// Slot bar UI component using UI Toolkit that manages multiple item slots.
/// Supports inventory grids, equipment bars, and quickslot strips.
/// Generated by Unity-AI-Forge.
/// </summary>
public class {{CLASS_NAME}} : MonoBehaviour
{
    #region Types

    [Serializable]
    public class SlotData
    {
        public string itemId;
        public string itemName;
        public string iconPath;
        public int quantity = 1;
        public string category;
    }

    #endregion

    #region Settings

    [Header("Identity")]
    [SerializeField] private string barId = "{{BAR_ID}}";

    [Header("UI")]
    [SerializeField] private UIDocument uiDocument;

    [Header("Bar Settings")]
    [SerializeField] private int slotCount = {{SLOT_COUNT}};
    [SerializeField] private string inventoryId = "{{INVENTORY_ID}}";

    #endregion

    #region Events

    [Header("Events")]
    public UnityEvent<int, SlotData> OnSlotChanged = new UnityEvent<int, SlotData>();
    public UnityEvent<int> OnSlotClicked = new UnityEvent<int>();

    #endregion

    #region State

    private readonly List<SlotData> slots = new List<SlotData>();
    private readonly List<VisualElement> slotElements = new List<VisualElement>();

    #endregion

    #region Registry

    private static readonly Dictionary<string, {{CLASS_NAME}}> _registry =
        new Dictionary<string, {{CLASS_NAME}}>();

    public static {{CLASS_NAME}} FindById(string id)
    {
        return _registry.TryGetValue(id, out var s) ? s : null;
    }

    #endregion

    #region Properties

    public string BarId => barId;
    public int SlotCount => slotCount;
    public string InventoryId => inventoryId;

    #endregion

    #region Lifecycle

    private void OnEnable()
    {
        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(barId))
            _registry[barId] = this;

        // Initialize slot data list
        slots.Clear();
        for (int i = 0; i < slotCount; i++)
            slots.Add(null);

        ResolveElements();
    }

    private void OnDisable()
    {
        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(barId))
            _registry.Remove(barId);
    }

    #endregion

    #region Public API

    public void SetSlotItem(int index, SlotData item)
    {
        if (index < 0 || index >= slotCount) return;
        while (slots.Count <= index) slots.Add(null);
        slots[index] = item;
        RefreshSlotVisuals(index);
        OnSlotChanged?.Invoke(index, item);
    }

    public void ClearSlot(int index)
    {
        SetSlotItem(index, null);
    }

    public void ClearAll()
    {
        for (int i = 0; i < slotCount; i++)
        {
            slots[i] = null;
            RefreshSlotVisuals(i);
        }
    }

    public SlotData GetSlotItem(int index)
    {
        if (index < 0 || index >= slots.Count) return null;
        return slots[index];
    }

    public bool IsSlotEmpty(int index)
    {
        var item = GetSlotItem(index);
        return item == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.itemId);
    }

    #endregion

    #region Internal

    private void ResolveElements()
    {
        slotElements.Clear();

        if (uiDocument == null)
            uiDocument = GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        if (uiDocument == null || uiDocument.rootVisualElement == null)
            return;

        var root = uiDocument.rootVisualElement;

        for (int i = 0; i < slotCount; i++)
        {
            var slotEl = root.Q($"slot-{i}");
            slotElements.Add(slotEl);

            if (slotEl != null)
            {
                int capturedIndex = i;
                slotEl.RegisterCallback<ClickEvent>(_ => OnSlotClicked?.Invoke(capturedIndex));
            }

            RefreshSlotVisuals(i);
        }
    }

    private void RefreshSlotVisuals(int index)
    {
        if (index < 0 || index >= slotElements.Count) return;
        var slotEl = slotElements[index];
        if (slotEl == null) return;

        var item = GetSlotItem(index);
        var isEmpty = item == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.itemId);

        var iconEl = slotEl.Q($"icon-{index}");
        var qtyLabel = slotEl.Q<Label>($"quantity-{index}");

        if (isEmpty)
        {
            if (iconEl != null) iconEl.style.display = DisplayStyle.None;
            if (qtyLabel != null) qtyLabel.text = "";
            slotEl.RemoveFromClassList("slot--filled");
            slotEl.AddToClassList("slot--empty");
        }
        else
        {
            if (iconEl != null) iconEl.style.display = DisplayStyle.Flex;
            if (qtyLabel != null) qtyLabel.text = item.quantity > 1 ? item.quantity.ToString() : "";
            slotEl.RemoveFromClassList("slot--empty");
            slotEl.AddToClassList("slot--filled");
        }
    }

    #endregion
}
